titleStmt.title: SII 19.402: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 402. (A.R. No. 366 of 1924.) MĒLAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE AGASTYĒŚVARA SHRINE, AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 4 mā of wet land after reclamation in Ūragankuḍi a dēvadāna village in Poygai-nāḍu for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mahādēva of Avanigandarva-Īśvaragṛiham a dēvadāna in Kuṉṟakkūṟṟam. This must have been evidently under orders of the Paḻavēttaraiyar chief as in the case of a similar gift made in the 13th year of Rājakēsarivarman by order of Pūdi Paḻuvēttaraiyaṉ Kumaraṉ Kaṇḍaṉ (No. 235, S.I.I. Vol. XIII).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakeca
ripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6
āvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu teva
tānam Avaṉikantaṟva Īśvaragṛha
ttu māhādevaṟkku Ittaḷi
tevatāṉam poykaināṭṭu Ūra
kaṉkuṭi Apohanaṅkiṭanta bhū
miyai kalli macakki kuṭutta ṇirṉi
lam Iraṇṭu pū viḷaiyak kuṭutta nila
m ṉāṉ(ṅ)kumā Iṉṉāṉku māvuṅ
koṇṭu Itaṉil Iraṇṭu pūvum
viḷainta bhogaṅ koṇṭu O
ru nontāviḷakku cantrātittava
l Eriypommānom Ittaḷi
p paṭṭuṭaiyom Eḻuvom
Itu panmāheśvararakṣaiḥ—
Digital edition of SII 19.402 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
